title.en: But he also knew how he had fallen.

content.en:
"The replica body has fallen?"

Ye Tian was a little confused, the speed of this fall was too fast, and even he didn't react.

But he also knew how he had fallen.

"Endless Lord, what's going on?" the border lord~ Lord hurriedly asked.

Ye Tian said solemnly: "My doppelganger has fallen, entering this mountain range, the speed can't be fast, once the speed is fast, it will directly enter another time and space, and hit a black long river, and my doppelganger collided with the black long river, and it turned into ashes in an instant, and it was too late to react." "

"Such a weird place!"

The Frontier Lord hesitated, should this time go on - forward.

And Ye Tian had already lost a clone, and he was embarrassed to let Ye Tian continue to investigate.

Ye Tian didn't want to expose the secret that he could casually condense the doppelganger, and his relationship with the border lord was not so good.

He had done a condensation once before, and he had already exposed the secret of his fast condensation clone, but if he didn't restrict condensation, it would be too weird.

Therefore, this time he will not condense the copy body to explore the way.

After being silent for a long time, the border lord said, "Endless Lord, you went to explore the path once, this time I will explore the way." "

"Yes. "

Ye Tian agreed.

The Frontier Lord then flew towards the Grey Mountains at a very slow speed.

He remembered what happened to Ye Tiangang just now, so he didn't dare to shuttle quickly, and flew slowly.

Sure enough, he was very slow, so he didn't encounter the long black river.

However, at his current speed, it did take some time to leap over this gray mountain range.

"Maybe there is a treasure in this gray mountain range!"

The Frontier Lord guessed.

Soon, the border lord was dumbfounded, there was nothing here, and he hadn't found a single valuable treasure for a long time.

Just as he continued to go deeper, the smearing qi suddenly turned into a black silk thread, which swept towards him in an instant.

The Frontier Lord sensed the danger and immediately dodged with great speed.

And this dodge made him forget that he couldn't move at a very fast speed in this area.

Suddenly, he crashed into the long river of black.

Wow!

This doppelganger of the Frontier Lord has fallen.

......

Wuliang Mountain.

Ye Tian received a summons from the Border Lord's body.

"Endless Lord, that doppelganger of mine has fallen. "

"How did it fall?"

"I touched a wisp of black gas, sensed the danger, and instantly dodged, forgetting the speed for a while, and crashed directly into the black river, so I fell. If you go to the Gray Mountains, even if you encounter black gas, you have to keep the speed problem in mind. "

"Thank you Endless Lord for the reminder!"

"Endless Lord, all the clones I entered the Origin Realm have fallen, and I can't enter it in a short time, we have agreed that the opportunities obtained in it will be divided equally, if you find a little good thing in it, just give me a little. Wait until all my doppelgangers are condensed, and then go in later. "

"Yes!"

The border lord went all out to condense the clone, and Ye Tian was in a very good mood.

The clones of the Frontier Lord have all fallen, and he can have nothing to worry about.

In front of the Grey Mountains.

Ye Tian condensed one copy body after another.

Subsequently, Ye Tian let a replica body enter the Gray Mountain Range.

He flew slowly through the mountains, searching for possible chances or treasures.

After some time, a black aura appeared and swept over him.

The speed of this black qi is very fast, if he dodges it, his own speed needs to reach an extremely fast level, then it will inevitably be loaded with a long river of black.

Therefore, he chose not to dodge and directly suffered the attack of the black qi.

Burst!

The black qi directly entered Ye Tian's body, and then Ye Tian's body suffered a huge heavy blow.

Although Ye Tian's replica body did not fall, if it continued to be impacted a few times, it would definitely fall and die.

"The power of this black gas should belong to the same kind as the power in the black long river, and if you bear a trace of black gas, you will be hit hard, no wonder you will fall directly when you hit the black long river. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

Instead of returning, he continued to explore his way.

Anyway, he can continue to condense the copy body, even if a copy body falls, it doesn't matter at all

Soon, Ye Tian encountered another black gas attack.

This time, Ye Tian was hit hard again.

If he continues like this, he will be attacked again, and he will fall.

Not long after, Ye Tian was attacked again, and this replica body fell.

Subsequently, Ye Tian continued to let the replica body explore the path.

And just like that, time passed slowly.

"There is almost no pattern to the appearance of black gas, but it should be black gas that spreads out of the long river of black. Ye Tian guessed.

One after another, the copied bodies collapsed and fell, but Ye Tian kept exploring the way.

Gradually, he got to know a little bit about the gray mountains.

This gray mountain range is indeed very large and very strong, but in Ye Tian's eyes, this gray mountain range should not be a naturally born mountain range, but was moved here by an eternal master.

"Seal!"

Ye Tian guessed.

He suspected that this gray mountain range was used by some eternal master to seal the black river, or seal the entrance, but as time passed, it still could not be completely sealed, causing the gray mountain range to spread black gas.

...... 0...，

The reason why if the speed is fast, it will hit the black river, because the time and space here are unstable, and once the speed is fast, it will penetrate the time and space and enter the black river.

And the peak Legendary Realm lord is too weak, once he touches the black river, he will inevitably fall.

If this guess is accurate, this black river is afraid that it will be a great disaster, and the eternal master is afraid that the black river will rush into the void area, affecting the long river of time and the long river of destruction, so this place is sealed.

"I'm afraid this guess is very accurate, the Eternal Controller penetrates the past and the future, if the Black River threatens the Void Region, the Eternal Controller can spy on the future and know, so he can naturally seal it in advance. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Therefore, it is only natural that the Origin Realm has long been discovered by the Eternal Master.

It's just that the Eternal Masters don't care about the chances here.

But for Ye Tian, the opportunity here is extremely important.

Next, Ye Tian didn't want to look for opportunities in the gray long river, but wanted to cross the black long river and cross to the area outside the black long river.

Then, he continued to move forward for this plan, several replicating bodies moving together, and once one of the replicant bodies fell, he immediately copied another replica body and continued to move forward.

If he came, unless he destroyed all the replica bodies in an instant, he would definitely be able to cross this gray 1 vein. _
